PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-21-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Martin Eisenberg appearing for petitioner. Notice issues addressed. Guardianship petition is pending for the three minors. Jonathan Ferdon appearing for the Public Administrator. Mr. Ferdon confirms his conversation with Mr. Eisenberg. Court wants to think about it. Matter submitted. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
